title: (page unavailable)
shortDescription: Source page returned HTTP 404 at fetch time; kept as a stub so cross-references resolve. Data to be filled on a re-fetch.

title: Jungle Backyard
shortDescription: A deteriorating backyard ringed by impossibly tall walls, with a jungle reachable through a breach and one aggressive hound in residence.
atmosphere: Decrepit and overgrown, the dilapidated house showing signs of violent disturbance and lingering danger.
tips: Avoid the aggressive hound. Stay in the forest about a week to exit. The deeper jungle jams tracking. Approach brick walls with care.

title: Tranquility
shortDescription: A serene sky realm of wooden bridges suspended over a void, dotted with meditation points that ease the mind.
atmosphere: Constant daylight over shifting vine walls, gentle wind, and a profound tranquility free of entities or hazards.
tips: Visit the isolated meditation platforms to soothe distress. Falling into the void safely drops you into other natural levels.

title: The Lurking Darkness
shortDescription: An infinite house swallowed in darkness, its light fixtures failing and worm-like entities hunting; the layout shifts when unwatched.
atmosphere: Oppressive dark decaying domesticity of impossible layouts, unsettling silence and the threat of unseen predators.
tips: Move fast and stay hidden from Lurkers. Wait for the safe phase — every light comes on and the entities vanish — then find an exit.

title: Bloodstained Garden
shortDescription: A perpetually foggy forest of blood-red autumn trees, carnivorous flora that transforms wanderers, and massive hostile centipedes.
atmosphere: Thick fog, dim twilight and cool winds — nature itself actively hunts and consumes whoever enters.
tips: Never eat the blood-apples — it triggers irreversible transformation into a centipede. Move slowly near centipedes; avoid the mouth structures and the stump.

title: Exhibit
shortDescription: An infinite walk-through aquarium of shifting architecture and oppressive darkness that wears down visitors' minds.
atmosphere: Deafening silence broken by water sounds; pitch-black humid glass tunnels and a constant sense of being watched by empty tanks.
tips: Travel in groups with light sources, count heads often, ignore strange sounds, and leave immediately if you find an emergency door.

title: Bakery of Desire
shortDescription: A 1980s-style bakery that conjures items to match each visitor's tastes — its pastries hide dangerous, desire-tuned psychoactive effects.
atmosphere: A nostalgic yet unsettling bakery that adapts to your palate while masking lethal danger inside appealing confections.
tips: Never eat your favorite pastry — pick something neutral or disliked instead. Decide beforehand to avoid Faceling aggression in line.

title: The Eater
shortDescription: A vast theater complex whose chairs fuse to victims and force them to watch a unique film before the level slowly consumes them.
atmosphere: Unsettling and predatory: organic theater rooms built to trap and absorb visitors through chemical and psychological means.
tips: Never enter a theater room and never sit in a chair. The level actively hunts through deception and biological traps.

title: The Road Trip of Affliction
shortDescription: An infinite foggy highway where survival means never leaving your vehicle — something hunts whoever steps outside.
atmosphere: Perpetual darkness and thick fog swallow the endless highway; eerie silence broken by unseen threats above the abandoned cars.
tips: Never exit your vehicle. Drive toward tunnel exits perpendicular to the highway. Ration supplies — the trip can run long.

title: Froidetown
shortDescription: A frozen planetary city modeled on North American urban centers, from -15°C to -52°C, held by settlements amid dangerous entities.
atmosphere: Perpetually snowy and bitterly cold, North American architecture split between desolate exteriors and warm resource-rich shelters.
tips: Find heated buildings for shelter and check them thoroughly for entities first. Avoid office basements and suburbs at night. Ration food.
